{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Heaven’s Glory sentinels
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Heaven’s Glory sentinels]] attack [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
